## Checklist

<!-- All boxes must be checked before your PR will be reviewed. -->

- [ ] I have read the [pull request guide] and follow its requirements
- [ ] This PR is linked to an issue that was discussed and agreed upon
- [ ] My commits are [cryptographically signed]
- [ ] Every commit includes a `Signed-off-by` trailer, accepting the [DCO]
- [ ] I have run all relevant linters and style checkers without errors
- [ ] I have written or reviewed every line of code myself and can fully
      explain it – see our policy on [use of Generative AI]
